name: KOLORA
description: I built KOLORA from what I appreciate most in film photography: texture, light, honest contrast, and colors with character. The base version, KOLORA, is a bit warmer, with yellow-leaning greens and a softer balance. KOLORA PUSHED is colder and sharper, with deeper blacks, stronger contrast, and blue-shifted greens, inspired by pushed film stocks.
author: Denis Zeqiri (filmstill__)
whiteBalance: Auto A1 or Natural Light Auto
